title: Adenocalymma campicola
taxonomy: Adenocalymma campicola is classified within the family Bignoniaceae, a large and diverse family of flowering plants commonly known as the trumpet vine family. This family is part of the order Lamiales, which also includes other flowering plant families such as Acanthaceae and Lamiaceae. The classification of Adenocalymma campicola is further broken down into the subfamily Bignonioideae, which is a distinct subfamily within the family Bignoniaceae. The subfamily Bignonioideae is characterized by its unique flowers and fruit, and is thought to have originated in the Americas. The genus Adenocalymma is a group of flowering plants that are native to South America.
